calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Award Of Post Judgment Attorney'S Fees Pursuant To Civil Code 1717, Ccp1033.5 & Ccp685.040
Off Calendar Nov-01-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association's motion for post judgment attorneys fees is granted in the amount of $1350. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-05-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association's motion to compel responses to post judgment discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection within 21 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $340 are to be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-23-2006 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants
